texto: The [women's] march was pointless, classless, and brainless, but not harmless. One common theme was anger at certain crass comments Trump made in the past. To combat this, the march’s leaders and their lemmings decided to be crude, lewd, and even more crass in the present. It’s much like trying to correct your child’s cursing by cursing him out.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Selwyn Duke: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “The [women's] march was pointless, classless, and brainless, but not harmless. One common theme w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, hypocrisy, manners pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e manners.
